title: Drawn in to the Land of Adventure
overview: Makoto is preparing a science experiment for the school festival; when jealous rival Jinnai sabotages it, he inadvertently opens a portal to a strange and magnificent world.

title: Exploring the Kingdom of Mystery
overview: Makoto and Mr. Fujisawa rescue a beautiful young woman from giant humanoid bugs; she introduces herself as Princess Rune Venus of Roshtaria.

title: The Enchanting Princess
overview: Makoto and Mr. Fujisawa look for a way home; meanwhile, Jinnai enchants the Bugrom's Queen with his idea to attack a village's water supply.

title: The Lonely Priestess
overview: Rune Venus tells Makoto about Great Priestesses whose ancient magic might be able to take him home.

title: The Shrine of Wind
overview: Afura Mann, the Priestess of Wind, has a massive library that may have answers for Makoto.

title: A Game of Chance and Fire
overview: Makoto and Mr. Fujisawa journey to meet the Priestess of Fire, Shayla.

title: A Golden Opportunity
overview: While others are seeking a way home, Nanami is working.

title: Reunion
overview: Miz Mistal wishes for Mr. Fujisawa's love at a legendary fountain; when it malfunctions, she fears a catastrophe has occurred.

title: House of Thieves
overview: Nanami decides to open her own restaurant; when the kingdom's vegetables suddenly go missing, Makoto attempts to solve the mystery.

title: The Jungle Beast
overview: A village is being threatened by a monster who's is attacking its crops and livestock; seeking adventure, Mr. Fujisawa volunteers to go on a monster hunt.

title: A Child's Heart
overview: Makoto and Mr. Fujisawa decide to help Rune Venus take care of some orphaned children.

title: Tomb of the Demon God
overview: An oppressive heat wave covers the land.

title: Pure Evil Genius
overview: The ultimate weapon has awoken, and she's under the control of Jinnai.

title: The Legendary Snowfields
overview: One of the seven wonders of El-Hazard, the Legendary Snow falls only once every 100 years.

title: Tale of the Priestess
overview: A flashback to Shayla's encounter with an apprentice priestess that changed her destiny.

title: Whirlwind
overview: A gigantic whirlwind appears in the deserts of Roshtaria.

title: The Eye of God
overview: Rune Venus dreams of a golden room from her childhood, and wonders if it's the Chamber of Promises; Makoto goes with her to investigate.

title: Operation: Abduction
overview: Jinnai attempts to reverse his fortunes with a daring plan.

title: Hive of Darkness
overview: Makoto and Mr. Fujisawa are in hot pursuit of Jinnai in an attempt to rescue Rune Venus.

title: Jinnai: Sister vs. Brother
overview: Jinnai's decision to kidnap Nanami along with Rune Venus backfires when she discovers she can speak to the Bugrom.

title: A Love in Peril
overview: The Great Saint River is a dangerous, forbidden sanctuary.

title: A Death-Defying Rescue
overview: Makoto will have to face the Bugrom, Ifurita, and Jinnai's greatest trump card: Rune Venus.

title: Escape
overview: While Afura Mann and the Bugrom are searching for the Princess, Nanami has already found her.

title: Destiny
overview: Cataclysms rock the world and the Bugrom launch an all-out invasion; worst of all, the Eye of God is falling out of its orbit.

title: The End of the World
overview: Jinnai's dreams of conquest are about to come to fruition, but when Ifurita's personality abruptly changes, he looses control of her.

title: The Eternal Dream
overview: Makoto releases the reactor energy from the Eye of God.
